books.title: RightStart Mathematics Level A 2nd Ed. Book Bundle
books.rationale:
RightStart is based on discovery using a wide range of manipulatives. It is an up-to-date, spiraling program that uses methods that are heavily supported by current research. 
➜  Students also need the RS2 Math Set.
books.noteText:
The "Video" link will take you to a YouTube playlist where a master teacher will show you how to teach these lessons. 
eWorkbooks available for multiple students.

books.title: Math Card Games Kit
books.author: RightStart
books.rationale:
Kit is recommended for those who do not use RightStart Math; kit is included in the RS2 Math Set. 
➜  Additional recommended game titles will be listed with the Lesson Plans for each level of mathematics.
books.maySubText: any games that allow students to practice math concepts and skills.

books.title: Hands-On Equations Deluxe Home Set
books.author: Hands-On Equations
books.rationale: Hands-On Equations is a very concrete introduction to abstract algebraic concepts.
books.noteText:
Choose this or Denison.
The "Free" link will take you to a YouTube playlist where a master teacher goes through the first 22 lessons. 
➜ Manipulatives included.

books.title: The Hands-On Equations Verbal Problems Book
books.author: Hands-On Equations
books.rationale: Contains word problems wherein students apply what they learned in their lessons to real-world situations.
books.noteText: Must scroll down on site to purchase correct item.

books.title: RightStart Mathematics Level G 2nd Ed. Book Bundle
books.rationale:
RightStart is based on discovery, using a wide range of manipulatives. It is an up-to-date, spiraling program that uses methods that are heavily supported by current research. 
➜  Students new to Right Start will also need the G2S Math Set. Those who have the RS2 Math Set will need to order the G2S Set Short.
books.noteText:
Choose this or Denison. The "Free" link will take you to a YouTube playlist where a master teacher will walk you through how these lessons are structured and how to teach them.  Online class or Independent Video Class also available: https://store.rightstartmath.com/rightstart-mathematics-level-g-online-class/
➜ eWorkbooks are available for multiple students.

books.title: Math Card Games Kit
books.author: RightStart
books.rationale:
Kit is recommended for those who do not use RightStart Math; kit is included in the RS2 Math Set. 
➜  Additional recommended game titles will be listed with the Lesson Plans for each level of mathematics.
books.maySubText: any games that allow students to practice math concepts and skills.

books.title: Denison Pre-Algebra
books.author: Denison Algebra
books.rationale: Denison offers a complete high school math program with video lessons taught by a veteran teacher and homeschool dad for Pre-Algebra through Algebra 2. Pre-algebra only requires familiarity with the four basic functions (add, subtract, multiply, and divide). After Pre-Algebra, the course splits into two tracks for Algebra, Geometry, and Algebra 2: a track for students who don't have significant struggles but aren't enjoying math, and a Success track for students who struggle with math and need shorter lessons with more scaffolding.
books.noteText:
Choose this or Hands-On Equations
If following the Denison track, you only need to purchase this text for 7th-grade math. Use this in place of Hands-On Equations AND RightStart Geometry.

books.title: Math Card Games Kit

books.maySubText: any games that allow students to practice math concepts and skills.

books.title: Elementary Algebra Student Book
books.author: Harold Jacobs
books.rationale: This book uses inviting narrative and everyday problems to give an introduction to Algebraic concepts. Lots of practice problems are also included.
books.noteText: Choose this or Denison. The "Playlist" link will take you to a YouTube playlist where a teacher goes through the lessons.
books.maySubText: Algebra 1: from derekowens.com if you prefer an online course.

books.noteText: May add an online class from derekowens.com if desired.
books.maySubText: Geometry: A Guided Inquiry by Chakerian (mathwithoutborders.com/geometry/)

books.title: Denison Geometry
books.author: Denison

Pre-algebra only requires familiarity with the four basic functions (add, subtract, multiply, and divide). After Pre-Algebra, the course splits into two tracks for Algebra, Geometry, and Algebra 2: a track for students who don't have significant struggles but aren't enjoying math, and a Success track for students who struggle with math and need shorter lessons with more scaffolding.
books.noteText:
Choose this or Harold Jacobs Geometry
If following the Denison track, you only need to purchase this text for 9th-grade math. Use this in place of Harold Jacobs Geometry AND Elementary Algebra.

After Pre-Algebra, the course splits into two tracks for Algebra, Geometry, and Algebra 2: a track for students who don't have significant struggles but aren't enjoying math, and a Success track for students who struggle with math and need shorter lessons with more scaffolding.

books.title: Number Stories of Long Ago
books.author: David Smith
books.rationale: This is the story of how mathematics developed out of the early need for humans to have a language for "how many" and evolved into the robust system of arithmetic we know today.
books.maySubText: another edition, but page numbers will be different
books.sharedText:
Story of Arithmetic: Part 1
Story of Arithmetic: Part 2

books.title: Historical Atlas of the World 6th Ed.
books.author: Rand McNally
books.rationale: Presents important periods and turning points in 5,000 years of history. Thematic maps include literacy, languages, religions, and more. Used across curriculum.
books.sharedText:
Resources: Grades 4-6
Resources: Grades 7-8
Resources: Grade 9
Resources: Grade 10
Resources: Grade 11
Resources: Grade 12
Story of Arithmetic: Part 1
Story of Arithmetic: Part 2
Story of Geometry: Part 1
Plutarch: Grades 6-8
First Citizen Stories
Ancient History: Grades 7-9

books.title: Student World Atlas 6th Ed.
books.author: National Geographic
books.rationale: This atlas is used across the curriculum as a reference and as a text to read in some lessons. With interesting information and pictures, this is an economical reference for students.
books.maySubText: other atlases; however, map work and other lessons refer specifically to this one.

books.title: The Student Bible Atlas, Revised Edition
books.author: Tim Dowley
books.rationale: This is a simple, inexpensive Bible atlas that provides full-page maps of the biblical lands of the Old and New Testaments. In Bible lessons, students will be directed to look at specific pages. This resource is for Grades 3-8 ONLY.
books.maySubText: other Bible atlas, though page numbers in lesson plans will not match.
